ogTitle: Cethana vs Chain Of Lagoons: Climate Safety

heading: Cethana vs Chain Of Lagoons — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cethana, Tasmania and Chain Of Lagoons, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Chain Of Lagoons has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Cethana (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cethana or Chain Of Lagoons safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cethana has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Chain Of Lagoons scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cethana scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Chain Of Lagoons scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cethana or Chain Of Lagoons?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Chain Of Lagoons has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
